other_observers: Andrew Spencer came out and saw the bird shortly after I found it, I was still there when he got there.; I was the original finder of the bird. Several others saw the bird.
specific_location: Swede Lake, which is on the southeast side of Fossil Creek Reservoir
description: Gray bill with a black tip. Red head with a yellowish buffy forehead. Pinkish breast. Gray sides and back. With a white spot in the wing and on the side towards the back of the bird. The back of the bird and the tail was black.Behaviors: Swam around the whole time I was watching it. It was following a female American Wigeon most of the time. It called occasionally.Call: It gave a wigeon type call, but it was different than any American Wigeon that I had heard. It sound higher and it was a single note.Plumage: Adult
